query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.sessionNumber, ms.sessionDate, ms.taskStatus, ms.taskMode, ms.isAssessment, ms.taskId, ms.customTaskTitle
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN students s ON ms.alunoId = s.id
WHERE s.name LIKE '%illena%'
ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
